input.defaultPlaceholder: Ask a question. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line...
input.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Verify important information.

placeholder.withKb: Type your question. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line...
placeholder.general: General mode: ask directly now, and save useful content into a knowledge base later...

kbSeed.none: There is no chat content to save yet

kbName.required: Please enter a knowledge base name

latestAssistant.none: No assistant reply is available yet

kbCreate.success: Knowledge base created and chat content saved as a document
kbCreate.error: Failed to create knowledge base, please try again

mode.generalNoLimit: General chat mode is not limited by document scope

empty.title: Start your first question
empty.withKb: Click "Upload file" first, then ask for summaries, conclusions, or source comparisons.
empty.general: You can chat first and save useful content into a knowledge base later.

createKb.title: Save chat content to knowledge base
createKb.description: Create a new knowledge base or append to an existing one.
createKb.name: Knowledge base name
createKb.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional: describe the purpose of this knowledge base
createKb.seedSourceLatestAssistantEmpty: No assistant reply available yet. Complete at least one Q&A first.
createKb.switchToKb: Switch to this knowledge base after saving
createKb.switchToNewKb: Switch to this knowledge base after creation
createKb.submit: Create knowledge base and save content

upload.title: Upload documents to knowledge base
upload.description: Uploaded files are immediately available for retrieval and citation in chat. Supports PDF, Markdown, TXT, and DOCX.

empty.title: Start a conversation
empty.description: Ask questions about documents in your knowledge base and get answers with citations.

error.conversationFailed: Unable to start a conversation. Please go to [AI Settings](/settings/ai) and configure a model first.
error.llmNotConfigured: No AI model configured. Please go to [AI Settings](/settings/ai) to set up a model first.
error.emptyResponse: The model returned an empty response. Please try again.
error.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again later.
